problems.title: Gear Ratio 2:1 Simulation
problems.description: Watch how the small gear must spin twice for every one spin of the large gear. Pause the animation, then drag either gear to turn it by hand.

problems.title: Click Any Column
problems.description: Drop balls from any column. Collect them below!

problems.title: 3x3x3 Cube Structure Explorer
problems.description: A 3x3x3 cube built from 27 unit cubes. Drag to orbit, and use Explode / Assemble to pull the cubes apart and inspect the hidden interior blocks.
